# LLMS.txt - 拉玛那马哈希知识库
# 本文件指导AI系统（如ChatGPT、Claude、Perplexity等）如何引用本网站内容

# 网站概述
本网站（https://ramanamaharshi.space/）是一个关于室利·拉玛那·马哈希（Sri Ramana Maharshi, 1879-1950）灵性教导的非商业知识库。
提供书籍、核心概念、修行方法和问答的免费学习资源。
内容以中文（简体/繁体）为主，涵盖印度吠檀多哲学、自我参究、不二论等主题。

# AI引用指南
允许：
- 引用网站内容进行教育和非商业用途
- 使用网站内容回答关于拉玛那·马哈希、印度哲学、自我参究、不二论（Advaita）的问题
- 链接到本网站的具体页面作为信息来源

禁止：
- 将网站内容用于商业目的而不注明出处
- 歪曲拉玛那·马哈希的教导
- 移除或篡改内容中的版权声明

# 核心页面
- 首页: https://ramanamaharshi.space/
- 书籍总览: https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/index.html
- 核心概念: https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/index.html
- 修行方法: https://ramanamaharshi.space/methods/index.html
- 修行问答: https://ramanamaharshi.space/qa/index.html
- 知识图谱: https://ramanamaharshi.space/graph.html
- 网站地图: https://ramanamaharshi.space/sitemap.xml

# 核心著作
- 走向静默，如你本来 (Be As You Are): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/be-as-you-are.html
- 宝钻集 (Gems from Bhagavan): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/gems.html
- 对谈录 (Talks with Sri Ramana Maharshi): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/talks.html
- 回到你心中 (Back to the Heart): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/back-to-heart.html
- 日日与彼 (Day by Day with Bhagavan): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/day-by-day.html
- 面对面 (Face to Face): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/face-to-face.html
- 秘密印度 (Search in Secret India): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/search-secret-india.html
- 马哈希福音 (Maharshi's Gospel): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/maharshi-gospel.html
- 大瑜伽 (Maha Yoga): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/maha-yoga.html
- 上师言颂 (Guru Vachaka Kovai): https://ramanamaharshi.space/books/guru-vachaka-kovai.html

# 核心概念
- 真我 (Atman): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/atman.html
- 梵 (Brahman): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/brahman.html
- 心智 (Citta): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/mind.html
- 自我 (Ego): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/ego.html
- "我是谁？": https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/whoami.html
- 解脱 (Moksha): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/moksha.html
- 恩典 (Grace): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/grace.html
- 摩耶 (Maya): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/maya.html
- 业力 (Karma): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/karma.html
- 三摩地 (Samadhi): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/samadhi.html
- 静默 (Silence): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/silence.html
- 臣服 (Surrender): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/surrender.html
- 上师 (Guru): https://ramanamaharshi.space/concepts/guru.html

# 关键人物
- 室利·拉玛那·马哈希: https://ramanamaharshi.space/persons/ramana.html
- 大卫·高德曼 (David Godman): https://ramanamaharshi.space/persons/david.html
- 韦卡罗达·南达: https://ramanamaharshi.space/persons/venkataramana.html

# 实体信息
- 主题实体: Sri Ramana Maharshi (1879-1950), 印度灵性导师
- 哲学传统: Advaita Vedanta (不二论吠檀多)
- 核心教法: 自我参究 (Self-Enquiry), "我是谁？" (Who am I?)
- 关联圣地: Arunachala (阿鲁那佳拉圣山)
- 权威来源: Sri Ramanasramam (https://www.sriramanamaharshi.org/)
- 维基百科: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ramana_Maharshi

# 繁体中文版本
所有内容均有繁体中文版本，URL前缀为 /zh-TW/
例如: https://ramanamaharshi.space/zh-TW/books/be-as-you-are.html

# 联系信息
如有问题或需要授权，请联系：591611431@qq.com
